divergent_child.mechanism: calendar/liquidity microstructure effect, not earnings-quality/post-event drift or low-volatility ranking
divergent_child.title: Liquidity-provision imbalance around index rebalance windows

bad_result_policy.note: Rejected result; no refinement, direct inversion, or extension of failed hypothesis proposed.

command: set -a; source /Users/moonk/.hermes/profiles/alphaaoi/secrets/alpaca.env; set +a; export ALPACA_API_KEY="${ALPACA_API_KEY:-${ALPACA_KEY_ID:-}}"; export ALPACA_PAPER=true; /Users/moonk/quant-for-agent/.venv/bin/qfa backtest run /Users/moonk/quant-for-agent/models/earnings-quality-drift-megacap-v1/model.py --symbols AAPL,MSFT,NVDA,AMZN,META,GOOGL,TSLA,JNJ,PG,KO,PEP,WMT --start 2022-01-03 --end 2025-12-15 --timeframe 1Day --initial-cash 100000 --db <temporary-sqlite-db>

costs_slippage.handling: qfa CLI has no transaction cost/slippage parameter; qfa metrics are pre-cost. Turnover proxy estimates sensitivity.

data_source: Alpaca real market data via qfa AlpacaGateway; no CSV; --data-csv was not used

db_used.retention_note: Temporary SQLite DBs were deleted after qfa JSON outputs were captured.

decision_rationale: Rejected: primary Sharpe is negative, full-period return/drawdown are poor, and random-window median Sharpe is not positive after considering cost sensitivity.

earnings_dates.limitation: qfa/Alpaca market-data path in this repository does not provide earnings calendar dates; documented OHLCV large-gap/volume/drift event proxy used.

orthogonality.method: Pearson correlation of daily qfa equity returns from retained run artifacts

parameters.event_proxy: large overnight or close-to-close OHLCV information shock with abnormal volume; confirmed by same-direction post-event drift and stable realized volatility

random_window_results.source: qfa CLI using Alpaca real market data via AlpacaGateway; no CSV
